summary: Meeting: Q3 Roadmap Planning Date: June 20, 2026 Attendees: Priya Nair, Arjun Sharma, Sanjay Pillai, Divya Krishnan
decisions: - The AI feature rollout was delayed due to API integration issues. Decided to prioritize this in Q3.
- Divya presented the new UX wireframes. The team agreed to proceed with the dark mode redesign.
- Agreed to start AI feature development in Week 1 of Q3 with Arjun's team.
- Weekly syncs confirmed every Tuesday at 10 AM IST.

action_items.description: - Rahul flagged that the staging environment needs to be set up before development begins.
- Divya Krishnan needs to complete UX wireframes by July 5.
- Rahul Menon should configure staging server by June 25.
